message:
fix(sync): deduplicate pool return wakers and split semaphore borrow

pool.rs: Two fixes in the resource pool:
  - release_internal(): Replace `wakers.drain(..).collect::<Vec<_>>()`
    with `std::mem::take(&mut *wakers)` for clearer ownership transfer
    and fewer allocations (take returns the existing Vec, replacing
    it with an empty one in-place).
  - WaitForReturn::poll(): Guard the waker push with
    `wakers.iter().any(|w| w.will_wake(cx.waker()))` to prevent
    duplicate wakers from accumulating on repeated polls.  Without
    this, each re-poll appended another clone, causing unbounded
    growth and redundant wake calls.

semaphore.rs: In OwnedAcquireFuture::poll(), clone the Arc<Semaphore>
into a local `sem` before locking `sem.state`.  This splits the
borrow so that `self.waiter_id` remains accessible for mutable
access while the state guard borrows through `sem` rather than
through `self.semaphore`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
